textByHash.465ef17eceb8489e09750508c264245869f5e26a: Hello there! Looking to take advantage of the Mistrock mines? If so, I'm happy to buy any ores from you. I can also sell you some tools if needed.
textByHash.27a4976254c1fe9fe313f47ef4ffa77f51e44065: Mistrock? It's a mining outpost. It was set up by Cam Torum after you humans went and had another of your wars. We lost some good mines and needed to find new ones.
textByHash.47150689f7e015b548ef89d34e5684f9ba39e6cb: It wasn't the first choice, but both humans and dwarves alike were pretty poor after the fighting ended, so we all had to learn lessons in how to compromise.
textByHash.37e25fadfef88baffe7d914380ce5e069116e68a: Still, it ended up not being too bad in the end. We found there was a reasonable supply of coal and iron here, along with some silver and gold.
textByHash.174168f521e8f3a57bce5df380485bb173c18e81: The location ended up being quite appealing for some as well. It makes for a nice change of scenery for those that appreciate that sort of thing.
textByHash.ce7a0e4f8540827091112c8b6d80d866e7a83582: Nothing much of note. The land here was owned by the Moonrise Brewery and Winery, but they found it wasn't much good for growing grapes.
textByHash.9213945f2973cb34232ba383942d2487506734b3: Very happy. They saw an opportunity for a new business relationship. In return for giving us the land, we now give them favourable rates on what we mine here.
textByHash.3d53c7be6a3523614fc5cd41e20985ec3ff5ddde: Apparently so. I guess they use it to make and maintain all their fancy brewing and winemaking equipment.
textByHash.f48d2e4d92a432ef13d1462d0f635542b3991b98: But anyway, enough about that. Are you interested in buying or selling some ores?
textByHash.98a99369249468b4680cd9dc2ce08903764255ae: Well you know where I am if you change your mind.
